title: Citrusy Creamy Korean Mascarpone Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix dish featuring mascarpone, citrus flavors, and a touch of caramelization for a creamy yet tangy twist on traditional Korean stir-fries.

ingredients.name: Korean sausage
ingredients.notes: Use low-sodium or organic sausages if available

ingredients.name: Canned mandarin oranges
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's low-sodium if not specified

ingredients.name: Korean green chili pepper
ingredients.notes: Optional, seeds and membranes removed for less heat

instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the Korean sausage and cook until browned, about 4-5 minutes.
Add onion, green chili pepper (if using), and garlic to the pan; sauté for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Stir in mandarin oranges and their juice, lower heat to medium, and let simmer for about 2 minutes.
Remove from heat. Mix mascarpone cheese with a little of the cooked mixture to help it melt evenly.
Return sautéed ingredients to the pan. Add soy sauce and ginger juice; stir until all ingredients are well combined and creamy.
Add low-sodium soy sauce for finishing touch, stirring gently to combine.
Garnish with sesame seeds or chopped green onions if desired. Serve immediately.
